title: Helen's Babies
writer: John Habberton, Louis D. Lighton, Hope Loring
actors: Baby Peggy, Clara Bow, Jeanne Carpenter
plot: A young man who has vowed never to marry and doesn't particularly like children is left in charge of his two very young nieces. At first they drive him to distraction, but then he begins to warm to them, and also to a beautiful yo...
